headline: Prologis Gears Up For Q2 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
summary: Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD) will release Q2 earnings on July 16. Analysts predict EPS of 79 cents and revenue of $2.16B. Stock closed at $141.36 on Friday.

headline: Why I Don't Buy REIT CEFs

headline: Prologis Q2 Earnings Preview: All Eyes On Data Centers
summary: Prologis (PLD) Q2 outlook: ~5% FFO/revenue growth, 95.3% occupancy, 32% rent spreads.
